title: Take the Money and Run
relevance_summary: Ponzi scheme involving fake rewards for watching videos and inviting others, with daily payouts and referral bonuses

prevention.rule: Block any tx that sends funds to a contract known to be associated with a ponzi scheme.

summary: MetaMax operated a Ponzi scheme promising daily payouts and referral bonuses for watching videos and inviting others. Users lost millions as the scheme collapsed.
